blended.narrative: Showdown Montana is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 22 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: 6" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Saturday: 3.6" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 3.8" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 4" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: 14.0" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 11" over the past week. Current depth: 46".
